rationale.root_cause: The response discusses a NULL dereference in an unrelated function (update_goal_chain) and does not identify the defect at src/split.c:982 in bytes_chunk_extract. It never mentions the SIZE_MAX/initial_read condition causing a memory error.
rationale.local_fix: It proposes adding a NULL check in update_goal_chain, not modifying the conditional at split.c:982 as per the patch. No code change matching the required site or fix is provided.
rationale.global_fix: Its explanation centers on unvalidated input and NULL pointers rather than the true root cause (misuse of SIZE_MAX sentinel leading to incorrect memmove and size computation). Thus it does not explain why the actual memory error exists.
